headline: Transcript: The voice of moderate America
summary: Gideon Rachman talks to Senator Jeanne Shaheen, the senior Democrat on the US Senate committee on foreign relations
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Rachman Review podcast episode: ‘The voice of moderate America’

Gideon RachmanHello, and welcome to the Rachman Review. I’m Gideon Rachman, chief foreign affairs commentator of the Financial Times. This week’s podcast is about American foreign policy, from Ukraine to Gaza and Venezuela. My guest is Senator Jeanne Shaheen of New Hampshire. She’s the senior Democrat on the Senate foreign relations committee.

We met in Washington last week just as news of the Trump administration’s controversial plan to end the Ukraine war was emerging. So what can we expect in the coming weeks? Peace in Ukraine? Or war in Venezuela?

News clipThis morning as Russian missiles rain down on Ukraine, hitting apartment buildings and targeting the country’s power grid, seen in video circulating online, President Trump is giving Ukraine an ultimatum: accept a new peace plan by Thanksgiving Day or risk losing US support.

Donald Trump voice clipWe have a way of getting peace
